query:
ALTER TABLE web_app_findings 
ADD COLUMN mitre_attack_id varchar(20),
ADD COLUMN mitre_attack_name varchar(255),
ADD COLUMN mitre_tactic varchar(100),
ADD COLUMN exploit_available boolean DEFAULT false,
ADD COLUMN exploit_module_path varchar(512),
ADD COLUMN caldera_ability_id varchar(100),
ADD COLUMN ai_triage_verdict varchar(50),
ADD COLUMN ai_triage_reason text,
ADD COLUMN false_positive_score double;

ADD COLUMN caldera_ability_id varchar(100),
ADD COLUMN ai_triage_verdict varchar(50),
ADD COLUMN ai_triage_reason text,
